PathOfBuilding.Notes:
^x70FF70> 3.27 CHANGES <^7 - 50% reduced golem effect: affects us surprisingly little, small nerf - Suppress went from 50% to 40%: a nerf to our endgame defenses, also means you can prioritize getting suppress slightly less though. - Added leech to the PoB, this greatly improves your survivability in the early game, which is where you struggled the most.
^x70FF70> BLOODLINES <^7 As of writing this guide(25th of October) only 3 out of the 10 possible Bloodlines ascendancies are known, and none of them are good for us. If any good ones get revealed before leaguelaunch this guide will be updated with that in mind. For nodes to drop if you want to do some experimentation yourself: Heart of Destruction is the only one you can really drop for this build, and the Bloodlines ascendancy better be REALLY good to justify replacing that. If you're on trade league you could consider using Forbidden Flesh/Flame to grab an Elementalist node we already pick, and then replace it with a Bloodlines ascendancy.
^x70FF70> PLAYSTYLE <^7 You place down your Orb of Storms, this shocks the entire screen. Now you can cast Lightning Conduit while in the Orb of Storms to hit/kill all shocked enemies, this cast of Lightning Conduit triggers Orb of Storms again(automatically) which means you can cast Lightning Conduit again(or just hold it down). If you have good enough gear to get suppress capped while using an ^xAF6025Inpulsa's Broken Heart^7 dead enemies will explode, making your clear even better.
For single target you pretty much do the same as when clearing, except you cast Sigil of Power(if you have an unset ring, else you don't even run this) and Conductivity beforehand.
^x70FF70> LEVELING <^7 When you have level 28(for Lightning Conduit) AND normal lab you can start using Lightning Conduit. Your Area of Effect will be much smaller than in the endgame at this point, but single target should be great. Mana is the only issue you have to solve, and to do that we take nodes on the tree and run Clarity.
To get to level 28 we use the tried and tested(albeit slightly slow and boring) Stormblast Mine + Orb of Storms combo. Simply throw(and detonate) Stormblast Mines while standing in your Orb of Storms to kill enemies, on bosses you can prestack a big stack of Stormblast Mines to sometimes get them down in 1 go.
More advanced players willing to spend a bit more on respeccing their character can use Rolling Magma to get to level 28, this guide won't go into detail for that though, just know that it's fine if you prefer that.
^x70FF70> GOLEMS <^7 Because of Liege of the Primordial we can relatively reliably have golems up. While they will sometimes still die, they get resummoned automatically after 4 seconds. We make sure we don't rely on the buffs these golems give too much, but this is what they provide when they're up with the baseline of 200% buff effect(we get this from the tree and quality on golem gems): - 57% increased damage - 60% increased area of effect - 30% attack and cast speed - 54 mana regenerated per second (we try not to rely on this too much, but if this golem dies we do degen some mana) - 60% increased defenses(armour and evasion!) - 330 life regenerated per second - 15% of melee damage taken from golem before you(if this scales it's 45%, just not sure if it does)
Early on you can opt to use Chaos Golem over Stone Golem of Safeguarding, this will give you 51% chaos resistance when it's up, which can be nice but you don't really want to rely on this in the long term.
^x70FF70> GETTING 65% SHOCK <^7 With our baseline 25% shock from Shaper of Storms, we need 160% increased effect of shock to get to 65% shock. This is very important for our damage. Some sources of increased shock effect, in order of how recommended they are to get to 160%: - 10% from the small ascendancy node before Shaper of Storms - 54% from Unbound Ailments(69% from the Awakened Version) - 20% from the small node before Divine Judgement - 30% from a craft on boots(40% if you use the veiled version) - 30% from Ash, Frost and Storm annoint - 25% from Inpulsa - 15% from Hypnotic Eye Jewels - 30% from a craft on amulet(40% if you use the veiled version) - 50% from Breath of Lightning on the tree - 50% from Static Blows on the tree
^x70FF70> EXPOSURE <^7 To enable Mastermind of Discord from Elementalist you need to apply Exposure. The easiest way to do this is to get it as a gloves implicit from Eater of Worlds Ichors. If you don't have Eater of Worlds ichors yet you can replace Sigil of Power with Wave of Conviction(or use an unset ring). In the very endgame we use a wand with the crusader mod for lightning exposure, and replace the exposure on gloves with leech.
^x70FF70> LIFE LEECH <^7 Having life leech is very important for your survivability early on, and can be surprisingly hard to get in the endgame. Potential sources of leech are: - ^xAF6025Berek's Grip^7 - ^xAF6025Valako's Sign^7 - Eater of Worlds glove implicit(make sure you get Exposure somewhere else! Our endgame setup gets this on wand) - Amulet temple mod(+46-48% to Lightning Resistance/Lightning Leech hybrid, you can use Harvest to swap from fire or cold to lightning) - Shaper or Crusader influence on amulet
^x70FF70> FAQ <^7 ^xADAA47I can't color my chest, help!^7 To get 5 off-colors on an armour/evasion chest you can first make it at least 4-socket and manually color it with the crafting bench, then use the crafting bench to go from 2-socket to 3-socket and back until the 3rd socket turns off-color. Repeat this for 3-4 sockets and 4-5 sockets. You want to save the red socket for your 6th socket, since going from 5 to 6 sockets costs a lot of jewellers and you want the odds to hit what you want to be as high as possible.
If you can't get 5 off-colors, which can be pretty hard, you can use an Evasion/Energy Shield chest instead. Make sure you drop the Armour Mastery that gives you +1 max res though. Alternatively you can replace on of your links with Cruelty. Preferably replace Arcane Surge, but only if you still have enough mana sustain afterwards.
^xADAA47How do I solve mana issues?^7 If your Lightning Golem is down, or if you don't have a reliable uptime of the mana regen from Mastermind of Discord yet, you can have mana issues. Some ways to deal with this: - Use Inspiration support - Craft -mana cost on rings and/or amulet - Don't use Stone Golem of Safeguarding and run 2 Lightning Golems instead - Make sure Mastermind of Discord is up permanently by having Exposure on gloves(see ^x70FF70> EXPOSURE <^7) - Grab mana nodes on the tree - Use a mana flask - Very worst case: Grab Eldritch Battery on the tree
^xADAA47What's up with the Righteous Fire?^7 Righteous Fire of Arcane Devotion gives 25% MORE cast speed since patch 3.26. The degen of RF is usually based on life(so pretty hard to sustain), but for Arcane Devotion is based on mana, which is much easier to sustain. If you don't have Arcane Devotion DO NOT run the normal RF, you'll just degen.
^xADAA47Can I use something other than Orb of Storms to trigger shock?^7 The only viable alternative imo is Storm Brand, this allows you to fight enemies from further away(which could be useful in Hardcore), but hits much less of the screen. Links and tree for this setup are the same, just replace Orb of Storms with Storm Brand
^xADAA47Why is Convergence not ticked in PoB?^7 Ticking Convergence on non-ignite builds is padding imo.
^xADAA47Do I really need to use Dawnbreaker?^7 Nah, you can use another shield(with suppress) instead. This will lose you a good chunk of physical mitigation though.

Skill.label: Lightning Golem(@lvl 34, try to keep it alive)

Skill.source: Item:1:Mark of the Shaper, Opal Ring
Item:1:Mark of the Shaper, Opal Ring

Skill.label: If you have an unset ring, add this

Rarity: RARE Early Game Chest Sadist Garb Evasion: 1108 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Energy Shield: 241 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.718}LocalIncreasedEvasionAndEnergyShield6 Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: {range:1}ColdResist4 Suffix: {range:1}LightningResist4 Suffix: None Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B-B-B-B LevelReq: 68 Implicits: 0 88% increased Evasion and Energy Shield +29% to Cold Resistance +29% to Lightning Resistance

Rarity: RARE Early Game Boots Dragonscale Boots Armour: 167 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Evasion: 167 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}IncreasedLife4 Prefix: {range:0.796}MovementVelocity5 Prefix: None Suffix: None Suffix: None Suffix: None Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-G LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 0 +62 to maximum Life 30% increased Movement Speed {tags:elemental,fire,lightning,resistance}{crafted}{range:0.5}+(17-20)% to Fire and Lightning Resistances

Rarity: RARE Early Game Ring Amethyst Ring Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.113}IncreasedLife6 Prefix: {range:0.482}IncreasedMana11 Prefix: None Suffix: {range:0.718}ColdResist4 Suffix: None Suffix: None LevelReq: 60 Implicits: 1 {tags:chaos,resistance}{range:0.5}+(17-23)% to Chaos Resistance +87 to maximum Life +66 to maximum Mana +28% to Cold Resistance

Rarity: RARE Early Game Belt Leather Belt Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}IncreasedLife7 Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: {range:0.9}ChaosResist4 Suffix: None Suffix: None LevelReq: 44 Implicits: 1 {tags:resource,life}{range:1}+(25-40) to maximum Life +107 to maximum Life +25% to Chaos Resistance

Rarity: MAGIC Flagellant's Quicksilver Flask of the Cheetah Crafted: true Prefix: {range:1}FlaskFullRechargeOnHit5___ Suffix: {range:1}FlaskBuffMovementSpeedWhileHealing3 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 68 Implicits: 0 Gain 3 Charges when you are Hit by an Enemy 14% increased Movement Speed during Effect

Rarity: RARE New Item Hypnotic Eye Jewel Crafted: true Prefix: {range:1}AbyssJewelAddedLife4 Prefix: {range:0.141}AbyssSpellAddedLightningDamageWhileHoldingAShieldJewel5 Suffix: {range:1}AbyssJewelShockEffect1 Suffix: None LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 0 +40 to maximum Life 2 to 34 Added Spell Lightning Damage while holding a Shield 15% increased Effect of Lightning Ailments

Rarity: RARE Endgame Belt Stygian Vise Hunter Item Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.901}IncreasedPhysicalDamageReductionRating7 Prefix: {range:0.085}IncreasedLife9 Prefix: {range:1}MaximumLifeInfluence2 Suffix: {range:0.648}FireResist7 Suffix: {range:0.775}ColdResist6 Suffix: None Catalyst: Fertile CatalystQuality: 20 Sockets: A LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 1 Has 1 Abyssal Socket +454 to Armour +157 to maximum Life 12% increased maximum Life +44% to Fire Resistance +40% to Cold Resistance {tags:unveiled_mod,attribute}{crafted}{range:1}+(21-25) to Strength and Dexterity

Rarity: RARE New Item Hypnotic Eye Jewel Crafted: true Prefix: {range:1}AbyssJewelAddedLife4 Prefix: {range:0.141}AbyssSpellAddedLightningDamageWhileHoldingAShieldJewel5 Suffix: {range:1}AbyssCastSpeedIfCriticalStrikeDealtRecentlyJewel1 Suffix: None LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 0 +40 to maximum Life 2 to 34 Added Spell Lightning Damage while holding a Shield 7% increased Cast Speed if you've dealt a Critical Strike Recently

Rarity: UNIQUE Replica Dragonfang's Flight Onyx Amulet Catalyst: Intrinsic CatalystQuality: 20 Variant: Pre 3.23.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 2 LevelReq: 56 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates Ash, Frost and Storm {tags:jewellery_attribute}{range:1}+(10-16) to all Attributes {tags:jewellery_resistance}{variant:1}{range:0.5}+(10-15)% to all Elemental Resistances {tags:jewellery_resistance}{variant:2}{range:0.5}+(5-10)% to all Elemental Resistances +3 to Level of all Lightning Conduit Gems {variant:1}{range:0.5}(10-15)% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills {variant:2}{range:0.5}(5-10)% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills {variant:1}{range:0.5}Items and Gems have (10-15)% reduced Attribute Requirements {variant:2}{range:0.5}Items and Gems have (5-10)% reduced Attribute Requirements

Rarity: RARE Endgame Ring #2 Amethyst Ring Elder Item Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.465}IncreasedLife7 Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: {range:0.415}ChaosResist5 Suffix: {range:0.208}Dexterity9 Suffix: {range:1}AllResistances5 Catalyst: Fertile CatalystQuality: 20 LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 1 {tags:chaos,resistance}{range:1}+(17-23)% to Chaos Resistance +52 to Dexterity +128 to maximum Life +16% to all Elemental Resistances +28% to Chaos Resistance {tags:resource,unveiled_mod,mana}{crafted}{range:0.5}Non-Channelling Skills have -(7-6) to Total Mana Cost

Rarity: UNIQUE Berek's Grip Two-Stone Ring League: Domination, Nemesis Variant: Pre 2.6.0 Variant: Pre 3.8.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 3 LevelReq: 20 Implicits: 1 {tags:jewellery_resistance}{range:1}+(12-16)% to Cold and Lightning Resistances {tags:jewellery_elemental}{variant:1}{range:0.5}(10-15)% increased Cold Damage {tags:jewellery_elemental}{variant:2,3}{range:0.5}(25-30)% increased Cold Damage {tags:jewellery_elemental,attack}{variant:1}{range:0.5}Adds 1 to (1-50) Lightning Damage to Attacks {tags:jewellery_elemental,attack,caster}{variant:2,3}{range:0.5}Adds 1 to (50-70) Lightning Damage to Spells and Attacks {tags:life}{range:1}+(30-40) to maximum Life {tags:life}{variant:1}1% of Damage Leeched as Life against Frozen Enemies {tags:life}{variant:2,3}1% of Damage Leeched as Life against Shocked Enemies {tags:mana}{variant:1}1% of Damage Leeched as Mana against Shocked Enemies {tags:mana}{variant:2}1% of Damage Leeched as Mana against Frozen Enemies {tags:jewellery_defense}{variant:3}1% of Damage Leeched as Energy Shield against Frozen Enemies

Input.name: customMods
Input.string: ---3.27 Elementalist nerf--- 50% reduced effect of buffs granted by your golems
